meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to overcome SaaS knowledge gaps. A high-leverage checklist for freelancers using Antigravity to ship faster and scale.
content.answer_block: To bridge the gap in SaaS knowledge, leverage Claude Code to automate architecture and Antigravity to scaffold production-grade infrastructure. By mapping your freelance requirements to agentic workflows, you transform complex engineering hurdles into modular, repeatable execution steps, allowing you to ship high-quality client deliverables at unprecedented velocity.
content.intro:
The client deadline is screaming, your architecture diagram is a mess, and you’re staring at a blank terminal, paralyzed by the complexity of building a production-grade SaaS from scratch. You aren't just a coder anymore; you are a product architect, and the traditional slow-burn development cycle is your greatest enemy.

Relief arrives not through manual labor, but through the synthesis of agentic workflows. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you move from typing lines of code to directing an intelligent system that understands SaaS patterns, security protocols, and scalable infrastructure. This is the shift from 'building' to 'orchestrating' at machine speed.

steps.title: Agentic Environment Scoping
steps.description: Define the SaaS boundaries to prevent scope creep before a single line of code is written.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements for a [SaaS Type] and generate a modular architecture plan focused on scalability, authentication, and database schema.

steps.title: Scaffolding with Context
steps.description: Use Claude Code to establish the directory structure based on the Antigravity-validated blueprint.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure optimized for a Next.js and Supabase stack, including best practices for folder separation and API route handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'create file structure based on provided architecture'

steps.title: Automated Auth Integration
steps.description: Implement enterprise-grade authentication patterns without manual boilerplate fatigue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a secure authentication flow using Supabase Auth with Row Level Security policies for multi-tenant SaaS support.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'implement auth flow with RLS policies in the user schema'

steps.title: Database Schema Synthesis
steps.description: Transform business logic into optimized database models using intelligent schema generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Convert the following feature list into a normalized PostgreSQL schema, ensuring relational integrity and indexing for high-frequency queries.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'apply schema changes to the database and generate migration scripts'

steps.title: Continuous Validation Loop
steps.description: Deploy automated tests to ensure the AI-generated code meets production standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of unit tests for the core API endpoints to ensure edge cases and error handling are fully covered.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'run tests and fix any regression issues found in the latest commits'

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's 'memory' feature to persist client-specific coding standards across multiple projects to ensure brand consistency.
Always run your Antigravity outputs through a linting pass before committing to keep the AI-generated code clean.
Treat your Claude Code prompts as 'infrastructure as code'—store them in a repository to reuse logic for future client builds.
When facing a complex bug, use the 'claude explain' command to force the agent to document its own reasoning before applying a fix.
Optimize your token usage by splitting complex architectural requests into smaller, modular tasks rather than one monolithic prompt.
content.next_steps: Once your core stack is built, focus on deploying to a staging environment and using Claude Code's audit capabilities to identify potential security bottlenecks before the client review.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start acting like a senior architect who ships. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
